narrative:
Blendon Township has 6,947 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.0 percentage points.
